response.original_title: The old Lady and the Eternity
response.overview: Josefa Centeno, an 86-year-old woman, refuses to be uploaded to a digital afterlife, facing the consequences of defying the authoritarian regime. Built around archival footage, the director re-imagines his grandmother's life as a sci-fi fable about love, resistance and what it means to choose your own ending.
response.tagline: Everybody left to the Ark, except Josefa Centeno.
response.title: The old Lady and the Eternity
